prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: DOY-4PRONGCLOCKKEY-ODD Product Type: CLOCK Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: Universal Tool Antique Grandfather Clock Winding Key 4 Prongs - Odd Numbers Description: Do you need a sturdy and reliable replacement for your lost or misplaced clock key? The Universal Tool 4 Way Clock Key allows for the replacement or back up of original clock keys that are often lost over time.

This clock key can be used to wind grandfather clocks and other antique clocks so you can restore both beauty and functionality to your special clock. The key is made of durable brass material and will last a lifetime. The sizes that come with this key are 3, 5, 7 and 9. Search Terms: Antiques Grandfather Clock Brass Key Winding even universal antique supplies Antiquers Clock Collectors Features: - 4 Way Brass Clock Winding Key; Universal fit for most all antique grandfather wall clocks - Odd Number Sizes: 3, 5, 7, 9 - Durable Brass Material - When you are uncertain about what key size you need, this winding key will ensure you have the right size - Made in India === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Tool 4-Way Brass Antique Clock Winding Key

openai.item_name: Universal Tool 4-Prong Antique Grandfather Clock Winding Key

anthropic.title_differentiation: Odd Number Sizes 3 5 7 9, Durable Brass, Universal Fit Grandfather Clocks, Replacement Key

openai.title_differentiation: Odd Number Sizes 3 5 7 9, Durable Brass, Universal Fit For Most Antique Grandfather And Wall Clocks, Made In India
